title: opulus oxycoccos
intro: Opulus oxycoccos, also known as the cranberry, is a type of flowering shrub native to North America. The medicinal properties of Opulus oxycoccos lie in its high concentration of proanthocyanidins, which have been shown to have antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Opulus oxycoccos include reducing the risk of urinary tract infections and supporting the health of the gut and urinary tract. Opulus oxycoccos is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or juice, and is also used to make jams and sauces.
